---
title: "metric_from_spd"
generated: true
description: "Factor an explicit SPD metric $M$ into a [`FactorMetric`](../nitrix-smoothing-metric/FactorMetric.qmd)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.smoothing.metric`](../nitrix-smoothing-metric.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:metric_from_spd -->
```python
metric_from_spd(spd: Float[Array, 'd_f d_f']) -> FactorMetric
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:metric_from_spd -->
Factor an explicit SPD metric $M$ into a [`FactorMetric`](../nitrix-smoothing-metric/FactorMetric.qmd).

Use when the metric is naturally expressed as a full SPD matrix
(a learned or estimated precision over feature space) rather than
as a factor.  Returns a [`FactorMetric`](../nitrix-smoothing-metric/FactorMetric.qmd) holding the
lower-triangular Cholesky factor $L$ with
$M = L L^{\top}$, so `FactorMetric.project` on a
difference $d$ yields `d @ L` and reproduces
$d^{\top} M d$ exactly.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:metric_from_spd -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `spd` | `Float` | `d_f` × `d_f` | — | Symmetric positive-definite metric $M$, shape $(d_f, d_f)$. |

**Returns** `FactorMetric`. A [`FactorMetric`](../nitrix-smoothing-metric/FactorMetric.qmd) with `factor = cholesky(spd)`, shape $(d_f, d_f)$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:metric_from_spd -->
::: {.callout-note}
Numerical conditioning of $M$ is the caller's responsibility;
[`nitrix.linalg`](../nitrix-linalg.qmd) provides reconditioning helpers if a
near-singular metric must be regularised before factoring.
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:metric_from_spd -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `d_f` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
